name: audit-orchestrator
description: Universal Pre-Scan -> Analysis -> Optimization -> Report orchestrator for any project type (web, infra, homelab, CLI, library, backend, monorepo, docs, data/ML). Self-detects project type; state lives in .audit-session/<date>-<slug>/ with INDEX.md + STATUS.md for crash-resilient resume. Delegates to /audit + /project-audit + /astro-audit + /sveltekit-audit + /db-audit + /auth-audit when a web framework is detected.
